org.arakhne.neteditor.formalism

Interface Edge<G extends Graph<?,N,A,E>,N extends Node<G,?,A,E>,A extends Anchor<G,N,?,E>,E extends Edge<G,N,A,?>>

  • Type Parameters:
    G - is the type of the graph.
    N - is the type of the node inside the graph.
    A - is the type of the anchors inside the graph.
    E - is the type of the node inside the graph.
    All Superinterfaces:
    Comparable<ModelObject>, ModelObject, Serializable
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    AbstractEdge, FSMTransition, StandardEdge

    public interface Edge<G extends Graph<?,N,A,E>,N extends Node<G,?,A,E>,A extends Anchor<G,N,?,E>,E extends Edge<G,N,A,?>>
extends ModelObject
    Abstract ModelObject class for representing edges between anchors.
    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:02:58
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
    Maven Artifact Id:
    neteditor-formalism

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void disconnect()
      Disconnect the edge from the anchors.
      A getEndAnchor()
      Reply the end connection point.
      String getExternalLabel()
      Replies a string that may be used to put on the size of the edge.
      G getGraph()
      Get the Graph of this Node
      A getOtherSideFrom(Anchor<?,?,?,?> anchor)
      Replies the anchor at the other side of this edge from the specified anchor.
      N getOtherSideFrom(Node<?,?,?,?> node)
      Replies the node at the other side of this edge from the specified node.
      A getStartAnchor()
      Reply the begin connection point.
      void setEndAnchor(A anchor)
      Set the end connection point.
      void setGraph(G graph)
      Set the Graph of this Node
      void setStartAnchor(A anchor)
      Set the begin connection point.

      • Methods inherited from interface org.arakhne.neteditor.formalism.ModelObject

        addModelObjectListener, findModelObject, fireComponentAdded, fireComponentRemoved, fireContainerChanged, fireContentChanged, fireLinkChanged, firePropertyChanged, getMetamodelSpecification, getName, getProperties, getUIEditableProperties, getUUID, getViewBinding, removeModelObjectListener, setName, setProperties, setUUID

      • Methods inherited from interface java.lang.Comparable

        compareTo

    • Method Detail

      • getExternalLabel

        String getExternalLabel()
        Replies a string that may be used to put on the size of the edge. Basically it is composed of the name of the edge replied by ModelObject.getName() and any other label added by the subclasses.
        Returns:
        the external label that is describing this node.

      • getGraph

        G getGraph()
        Get the Graph of this Node
        Returns:
        a Graph.

      • setGraph

        void setGraph(G graph)
        Set the Graph of this Node
        Parameters:
        graph - a Graph.

      • getEndAnchor

        A getEndAnchor()
        Reply the end connection point.
        Returns:
        connection point.

      • setEndAnchor

        void setEndAnchor(A anchor)
        Set the end connection point.
        Parameters:
        anchor - connection point.

      • getStartAnchor

        A getStartAnchor()
        Reply the begin connection point.
        Returns:
        connection port.

      • setStartAnchor

        void setStartAnchor(A anchor)
        Set the begin connection point.
        Parameters:
        anchor - connection point.

      • disconnect

        void disconnect()
        Disconnect the edge from the anchors.

      • getOtherSideFrom

        A getOtherSideFrom(Anchor<?,?,?,?> anchor)
        Replies the anchor at the other side of this edge from the specified anchor. If the specified anchor is null, this function replies null.
        Parameters:
        anchor - connection point.
        Returns:
        the anchor at the other side of the given anchor.
        See Also:
        getOtherSideFrom(Node)

      • getOtherSideFrom

        N getOtherSideFrom(Node<?,?,?,?> node)
        Replies the node at the other side of this edge from the specified node. If the specified node is null, this function replies null. This function is a convenient version of getOtherSideFrom(Anchor).
        Parameters:
        node -
        Returns:
        the anchor at the other side of the given anchor.
        Since:
        16.0
        See Also:
        getOtherSideFrom(Anchor)
